summary: Simple narrative hooks, demos, before/after value, and memorable framing for mountainash as a cross-backend data expression and quality toolkit.

concepts.name: Write Once, Run Anywhere
recommended_docs: Same ma.col('x').gt(10) works on Polars, pandas, and SQL
evidence: Three backend implementations with consistency guarantees

concepts.name: Schema as Code
recommended_docs: Define your schema once, apply everywhere
evidence: TypeSpec + ConformBuilder replace 1,400 lines of manual code with 130

concepts.name: Ternary Logic
evidence: Unique three-valued logic system with sentinel integers
